_comment: Committed template — copy to config.json per host. Live config.json and publish-state.json are gitignored. trajectory.json is committed (copy from trajectory.example.json).

_fieldDocs.instance: This host identity within trajectory.json. id must match a hosts[].id at instance.stageIndex; role is one of development, test, staging, production.
_fieldDocs.trajectory: Committed at .monms/trajectory.json (copy from trajectory.example.json). Same map on every host.
_fieldDocs.siteUrl: Public URL of this MonMS instance, no trailing slash. Must match trajectory hosts[].siteUrl for this instance.id.
_fieldDocs.productionUrl: HTTPS origin for Publish to live (content rail). Should match the production stage host siteUrl when this instance publishes content upstream.
_fieldDocs.publisherEmails: PocketBase user emails allowed to open /_monms/publish. Create users at /_/ first, then list their emails here.
_fieldDocs.allowedHosts: Hostnames passed to monms serve as --origins when the CLI flag is omitted. CLI --origins always wins.
_fieldDocs.bind: Listen address for monms serve as --http when the CLI flag is omitted. CLI --http always wins.
_fieldDocs.logging: Optional file log levels under .monms/logs/. Values: error, warn, info, debug, schema.
_fieldDocs.shapeSync: Crash-recovery: git fetch --tags and checkout ref at serve startup. Authoritative promote is tag push → GitHub Actions → POST /api/monms/shape/deploy. Pin ref to last deployed tag.
_fieldDocs.mcp: Optional MCP HTTP listener. Example: { "enabled": false, "host": "127.0.0.1", "port": "8091", "allowNonSuperuserKeys": false }
